nasb.text: I brought your fathers out of Egypt, and you came to the sea; and Egypt pursued your fathers with chariots and horsemen to the Red Sea.

esv.text: “‘Then I brought your fathers out of Egypt, and you came to the sea. And the Egyptians pursued your fathers with chariots and horsemen to the Red Sea.

cnv.text: 我領你們的列祖離開埃及，他們去到海邊；埃及人帶著戰車和馬兵，追趕你們的列祖直到紅海。

ccb.text: 我引领你们的祖先离开埃及来到红海的时候，埃及人带领战车骑兵追了上来。
